wins: Reaffirmation of $60 billion to $90 billion SAM for 3 hyperscale customers in 2027
Strong Q1 revenue growth of 25% year-on-year
Positive outlook for Q2 semiconductor revenue growth of 2% sequentially
risks: Non-AI semiconductor revenue is expected to be flattish sequentially
Resales in industrial are expected to be down in Q2
Uncertainty around new AI regulations potentially impacting design wins
Dependence on a few key hyperscale customers
Potential impact of tariffs on chip manufacturing
